chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-749 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of CMA No. 4731/2024 (Contempt) 01-10-2024. Petitioner Nirmal John Hindu present in person. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along with Ghulam Murtaza Soomro PS to Chairman on behalf of alleged contemnors No. 1 & 2. ******** Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo advocate files power as well as statement/ comments along with annexure on behalf of respondent respondents/alleged contemnors No. 1 & 2, taken on record, perusal of which reflects that brother of the petitioner has already been appointed on son quota and the his case cannot be considered on son quota basis. Upon a question as to where any position of PBS-1 to 4 is lying vacant, where the petition can be accommodated, the Court has been informed that if the petitioner applies to the department afresh, then his case can be considered. Let the petitioner has to apply afresh and such exercise be done according to SOPs on humanitarian ground. The petition stands disposed of in above terms. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
